zh.lifeSummary: 當Guerau de Cabrera URGEL於1180年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納時，他的父親Ponce de CABRERA28歲，母親Marquesa de Urgel17歲。他於1215年與Elo Pérez de Castro在西班牙結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1229年享年50歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guerau de Cabrera URGEL于1180年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納时，他的父亲Ponce de CABRERA28岁，母亲Marquesa de Urgel17岁。他于1215年与Elo Pérez de Castro在西班牙结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1229年享年50岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cabrera
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jorge, Francisco, Rafael, Jesus, Pedro, Miguel, Ramon.  Portuguese Lidio, Wenceslao, Anatolio, Joao, Ligia, Marcio.
Catalan and Spanish: habitational name from any of various minor places called Cabrera, from Late Latin capraria ‘place of goats’ (from Latin capra ‘goat’).

variants.name: Cabrerra
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Catalan and Spanish   Cabrera  .

nameMeanings.name: URGEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps from German Gurgel ‘throat’, a nickname for a drinker.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Guerau de Cabrera URGEL was born in 1180, in Girona, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Ponce de CABRERA, was 28 and his mother, Marquesa de Urgel, was 17. He married Elo Pérez de Castro in 1215, in Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1229, at the age of 50, and was buried in Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.Girona, Girona, Catalunya, Spain: Girona, el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guerau de Cabrera URGEL est né en 1180, à Girona, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Ponce de CABRERA, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marquesa de Urgel, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elo Pérez de Castro en 1215, à Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1229, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.Girona, Girona, Catalunya, Spain: Girona, el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Guerau de Cabrera URGEL 1180 in Girona, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ponce de CABRERA 28 und seine Mutter Marquesa de Urgel 17. Er hat 1215 in Spanien Elo Pérez de Castro geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1229 im Alter von 50 Jahren und wurde in Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guerau de Cabrera URGEL è nato il nel 1180 nel Girona, Catalunya, Spagna, il suo padre, Ponce de CABRERA, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Marquesa de Urgel, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Elo Pérez de Castro nel 1215, nel Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1229, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Guerau de Cabrera URGELが1180年にスペインカタルニーアギロナで生まれた時，父Ponce de CABRERAは28歳，母Marquesa de Urgelは17歳であった。1215年にスペインでElo Pérez de Castroと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1229年に50歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアターラゴナにて埋葬された。

ko.Girona, Girona, Catalunya, Spain: 스페인 카털니아 지로나 엘 지론e스 지로나
ko.lifeSummary: Guerau de Cabrera URGEL(이)가 1180년 스페인 카털니아 지로나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ponce de CABRERA(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Marquesa de Urgel(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1215년 스페인에서 Elo Pérez de Castro(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1229년 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아에 묻혔다.

pt.Girona, Girona, Catalunya, Spain: Girona, el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guerau de Cabrera URGEL nasceu em 1180, em Girona, Catalunya, Espanha, seu pai, Ponce de CABRERA, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marquesa de Urgel, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elo Pérez de Castro em 1215, em Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1229, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.Girona, Girona, Catalunya, Spain: гирона, эл гиронeс, гирона, каталуня, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guerau de Cabrera URGEL родился в 1180 г. в местности гирона, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Ponce de CABRERA было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marquesa de Urgel, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elo Pérez de Castro в 1215 г. в местности Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1229 г. в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.Girona, Girona, Catalunya, Spain: Gerona, el Gironès, Gerona, Cataluña, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guerau de Cabrera URGEL nació en 1180, en Gerona, Cataluña, España, su papá, Ponce de CABRERA, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Marquesa de Urgel, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elo Pérez de Castro en 1215, en España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1229, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
